name: N8n_getAseosHtml
description: Obtiene el html de los aseos

parameters.query:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    r."ReservaId",
    r."Reserva_id",
    r."Reserva__id",
    r."Reserva_reservationUrl",
    r."Reserva_checkOutDate" AS "Dia",              -- Día para agrupar (checkout)
    r."Reserva_checkOutTime" AS "CheckoutTime",
    al."AlojamientoStaysInternalName" AS "Depto",

    a."AseoReservaCheckOutId" AS "AseoId",
    a."AseoEstadoCodigo"      AS "AseoEstado",
    a."FechaServicio"         AS "AseoDate",
    a."HoraInicio"            AS "AseoTime"
  FROM public."Reserva" r
  LEFT JOIN public."Alojamiento" al
    ON al."AlojamientoId" = r."AlojamientoId"
  LEFT JOIN public."AseoReservaCheckOut" a
    ON a."ReservaId" = r."ReservaId"
   AND a."AseoEstadoCodigo" <> 'Cancelado'
   WHERE r."Reserva_type" in ( 'booked','reserved')
    AND r."Reserva_checkOutDate" >= date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Santiago')::date
)

SELECT
  b."Dia",
  b."Depto",
  b."ReservaId",
  b."Reserva_id",
  b."Reserva__id",
  b."Reserva_reservationUrl",
  1 AS "ItemOrden",
  'RESERVA' AS "ItemTipo",
  b."Dia" AS "EventoFecha",
  b."CheckoutTime" AS "EventoHora",
  NULL::bigint AS "AseoReservaCheckOutId",
  NULL::text   AS "AseoEstado",
  FALSE AS "FaltaAseo"
FROM base b

UNION ALL

SELECT
  b."Dia",
  b."Depto",
  b."ReservaId",
  b."Reserva_id",
  b."Reserva__id",
  b."Reserva_reservationUrl",
  2 AS "ItemOrden",
  'ASEO' AS "ItemTipo",
  b."AseoDate" AS "EventoFecha",
  b."AseoTime" AS "EventoHora",
  b."AseoId"   AS "AseoReservaCheckOutId",
  b."AseoEstado",
  (b."AseoId" IS NULL) AS "FaltaAseo"
FROM base b

ORDER BY
  "Dia" ASC,
  "Depto" ASC,
  "ItemOrden" ASC;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    r."ReservaId",
    r."Reserva_id",
    r."Reserva__id",
    r."Reserva_reservationUrl",
    r."Reserva_checkOutDate" AS "Dia",              -- Día para agrupar (checkout)
    r."Reserva_checkOutTime" AS "CheckoutTime",
    al."AlojamientoStaysInternalName" AS "Depto",

    a."AseoReservaCheckOutId" AS "AseoId",
    a."AseoEstadoCodigo"      AS "AseoEstado",
    a."FechaServicio"         AS "AseoDate",
    a."HoraInicio"            AS "AseoTime"
  FROM public."Reserva" r
  LEFT JOIN public."Alojamiento" al
    ON al."AlojamientoId" = r."AlojamientoId"
  LEFT JOIN public."AseoReservaCheckOut" a
    ON a."ReservaId" = r."ReservaId"
   AND a."AseoEstadoCodigo" <> 'Cancelado'
   WHERE r."Reserva_type" in ( 'booked','reserved')
    AND r."Reserva_checkOutDate" >= date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Santiago')::date
)

SELECT
  b."Dia",
  b."Depto",
  b."ReservaId",
  b."Reserva_id",
  b."Reserva__id",
  b."Reserva_reservationUrl",
  1 AS "ItemOrden",
  'RESERVA' AS "ItemTipo",
  b."Dia" AS "EventoFecha",
  b."CheckoutTime" AS "EventoHora",
  NULL::bigint AS "AseoReservaCheckOutId",
  NULL::text   AS "AseoEstado",
  FALSE AS "FaltaAseo"
FROM base b

UNION ALL

SELECT
  b."Dia",
  b."Depto",
  b."ReservaId",
  b."Reserva_id",
  b."Reserva__id",
  b."Reserva_reservationUrl",
  2 AS "ItemOrden",
  'ASEO' AS "ItemTipo",
  b."AseoDate" AS "EventoFecha",
  b."AseoTime" AS "EventoHora",
  b."AseoId"   AS "AseoReservaCheckOutId",
  b."AseoEstado",
  (b."AseoId" IS NULL) AS "FaltaAseo"
FROM base b

ORDER BY
  "Dia" ASC,
  "Depto" ASC,
  "ItemOrden" ASC;
